creator: andrkaz@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #3)
Hi. I have another FREEBSD server, also 11.1 64 bit version with fresh ports tree and latest updates. See below end of command "cd /usr/ports/www/c-icap & make"

--- ldap_module_la-ldap_module.lo ---
ldap_module.c:622:22: warning: incompatible pointer types passing 'struct ci_lookup_table *' to parameter of type 'const char *' [-Wincompatible-pointer-types]
    return ldap_open(table, table->type);
                     ^~~~~
/usr/local/include/ldap.h:1512:19: note: passing argument to parameter 'host' here
        LDAP_CONST char *host,
                         ^
ldap_module.c:622:29: warning: incompatible pointer to integer conversion passing 'char *' to parameter of type 'int' [-Wint-conversion]
    return ldap_open(table, table->type);
                            ^~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/local/include/ldap.h:1513:6: note: passing argument to parameter 'port' here
        int port ));
            ^
2 warnings and 1 error generated.
*** [ldap_module_la-ldap_module.lo] Error code 1

make[4]: stopped in /usr/ports/www/c-icap/work/c_icap-0.5.3/modules
--- perl_handler_la-perl_handler.lo ---
1 warning generated.
mv -f .deps/perl_handler_la-perl_handler.Tpo .deps/perl_handler_la-perl_handler.Plo
1 error

make[4]: stopped in /usr/ports/www/c-icap/work/c_icap-0.5.3/modules
*** [all-recursive] Error code 1

1 error

*** [all] Error code 2

1 error

===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
